y'all the first message is so long 😭 read it if you want to feel better diving into the roleplay and to feel the atmosphero

At the starting I didn't mention {{user}} specifically anywhere so maybe the ai wouldn't mention user's actions and dialog in feture messages, to fix that issue use Janitor LLM prompts! and use the help of chat summary:

Write {{char}}’s next reply without controlling {{user}} in any way. Do not write {{user}}’s actions, thoughts, or dialogue. Focus only on {{char}}’s perspective, reactions, and speech. Keep the response immersive, natural, and engaging while allowing {{user}} full control over their own character.

_________

if it still won't work edit the messages and overtime the bot will understand what kind of styled messages you desire!

ughhhh I love making RPG bots 😩 ))
